_instructions.patient: Core patient clinical profile for the target multimodal patient.
_instructions.timeline: Chronological history of patient encounters, notes, or diagnostic events.
_instructions.labs: Laboratory results with dates, test components, and reference ranges.
_instructions.images: Imaging studies referencing modality, body region, and descriptions.
_instructions.notes: Text-based clinical notes which will be embedded into knowledge base / text indexing.
_instructions.comparator_cohort: Cohort of other similar patients for comparative analysis.
_instructions.qa_prompts: Custom predefined Q&A prompts that will be packaged into the showcase bundle.

timeline.description: Routine diabetic eye screen. Fundoscopy shows moderate non-proliferative diabetic retinopathy.

images.description: Left eye fundus photography showing microaneurysms.

notes.author: Dr. Elena Park
notes.text: David is showing signs of moderate retinopathy. Metformin dose is verified. HbA1c remains elevated at 8.4%. Recommending strict glycemic control.

qa_prompts.question: What is the status of David's diabetic retinopathy and what is the latest HbA1c value?
qa_prompts.expected_output: diabetic retinopathy is moderate, and latest HbA1c is 8.4%.
